integration_validation_v2.evidence: state_probe.rs:1621-1662 (record_dcc_panel_projection: real PG upsert per panel_kind + in-tx DCC_PANEL_PROJECTION_RECORDED event); migration 0115 wired at mod.rs:2107. CONCERN: atelier_diagnostics_projections_tests.rs:136-175 proves PG row round-trip + list_by_kind isolation across all DccPanelKind, but does not assert the EventLedger event; EventLedger proof half missing

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V2 gap was missing EventLedger assertion. atelier_diagnostics_projections_tests.rs:170-224 mt148 now asserts DCC_PANEL_PROJECTION_RECORDED==1 per panel_id for every DccPanelKind, retaining per-kind PG round-trip and list_by_kind isolation. Implementation real per V2 (record_dcc_panel_projection, in-tx event, migration 0115).
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
